sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114683" key="xrh)/stai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρἤσται</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῆ ᾽σται,</orth> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρὴ ᾽σται,</orth> <sense id="n114683.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χρή.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
